heading: Meringandan West vs Mermaid Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Meringandan West, Queensland and Mermaid Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Meringandan West has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mermaid Beach (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Meringandan West or Mermaid Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Meringandan West has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Mermaid Beach scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Meringandan West scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Mermaid Beach scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Meringandan West or Mermaid Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Meringandan West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
